text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I know you shouldn't neglect even a minor injury,
but don't you think you're worrying a little too
much?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Is this part of your duty as a trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're asking if it hurts or not, I'll tell you
it certainly does.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's not so bad that I can't walk... Well, I'll have
you carry me home anyway.
choice_data_list: I'm not going easy on you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's not so bad that I can't walk... Well, I'll have
you carry me home anyway.
choice_data_list: I'm not going easy on you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good grief... I guess being so serious comes along
with being a worrywart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I was only half joking. But if you insist!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I carry Agnes Tachyon back to her dorm while
keeping an eye on her injury.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! If you were really worried about me, you'd at least do that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Now, I don't want to walk anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I succumb to her moping and wind up carrying her
back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're pretty harsh for one who's supposed to be
worried.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be mean, you could at least
patch me up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I can learn a thing or two from your
treatment techniques.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon observes me with a smile. From
the look on her face, it seems like she might have
learned something.
